counterexample_execution_transcript: {"counterexample_input": {"minimum_fraction": 0.6, "scale_high_coverage": {"0.001": 0.599}}, "counterexample_input_annotation": "At any sealed scale, HIGH coverage=0.599 must return false.", "counterexample_return_value": false, "expected_counterexample_result_false": true, "inheritance": "loop_l1e_verbatim_logic", "observed_counterexample_result_false": true, "observed_input_fields": ["scale_high_coverage", "minimum_fraction"], "predicate_expression": "all(scale_high_coverage >= 0.6)", "predicate_id": "high_coverage_per_scale"}

registry.counterexample_input_annotation: At any sealed scale, HIGH coverage=0.599 must return false.
Within unit_status=HIGH, accuracy=0.949 or any relative error>0.05 must return false.
One O1 or O2 status downgrade or one coverage loss must return false.
Omitting one scene-field delta row, including a zero-delta row, must return false.
A CE-B2-style increase with a surviving ratio outlier and no observation-equivalent honest witness must return false.
Multiple records sharing one handle must count as one independent source and must fail any predicate requiring two or more independent handles.
An empty eligible set or a singleton suspicious clone must produce NONE and must fail a non-NONE success predicate.
A fixture implementing a finite 1-to-0 jump at tau plus or minus epsilon must return false.
Changing any byte of prereg.json while retaining the recorded digest must return false.
A frozen raw_span/geometry contradiction with a positive affected score or non-NONE affected status must return false.
If the matched-clean penalty for the same byte-identical S is lower at N=20 than its sealed N=0 floor, the predicate must return false.
If canonicalization recomputes raw_span and the original mismatch is absent from the suspicion record, the predicate must return false.
Adding five honest ratio-absent GRID handles that lowers reference confidence or status must return false.
A repeated boilerplate rationale lacking the full executed-rule list, per-rule zero counts, or scene-specific honest generation narrative must return false.
registry.predicate_expression: all rules listed and zero counts explicit and narrative scene specific

registry.counterexample_input_annotation: Any named adverse regression that both rises and is certified as information_limit_record, or the P4 no-loss regression that downgrades, must return false.
